heading: Today
text: Morning snow south of Rt. 2 tapering off. Clouds, a few breaks of sun far north.

heading: Friday Night
text: Cloudy. Some rain or pockets of freezing rain north, a slight chance south.

heading: Saturday
text: Morning rain showers north. A few breaks of afternoon sun. Breezy, mild.

heading: Sunday
text: Any early showers ending. Becoming partly sunny.
